transcript:
Ji Cheng (Product Lead): Thanks everyone for joining. Today I want to review the progress on our AI meeting assistant and the email follow-up automation feature.

Sarah (Project Manager): The summarization endpoint is working well. We tested it with several transcripts and the system correctly extracted summaries and action items.

David (Backend Developer): I also finished the email generation service. It loads the meeting JSON and generates a follow-up email using the summary and action items.

Ji Cheng: That’s great progress. One thing we should improve next is the user experience. Right now users must manually enter the meeting file path when generating emails.

Sarah: Agreed. It would be better if the system could automatically detect the latest meeting file.

David: I can add a repository function to retrieve the most recent JSON file from the outputs folder.

Ji Cheng: Perfect. Let’s prioritize that for the next sprint.

Sarah: I’ll also start planning a simple web interface so non-technical users can upload transcripts and generate summaries.

Ji Cheng: Sounds good. Let’s regroup next week to review the improvements.
meeting_summary: The team reviewed the progress on the AI meeting assistant and email follow-up automation feature. The summarization endpoint is working well, and the email generation service has been completed. There is a need to improve user experience by allowing automatic detection of the latest meeting file. A plan for a simple web interface for non-technical users was also discussed.
key_decisions: Prioritize improving the user experience for file path detection in the next sprint.
Plan a simple web interface for non-technical users to upload transcripts and generate summaries.

action_items.task: Add a repository function to retrieve the most recent JSON file from the outputs folder.
Plan a simple web interface for non-technical users.

risks: Users may find manual file entry cumbersome if improvements are not made.
Non-technical users may face challenges in using the current system without a web interface.
